name: Lindsell Train Global Funds plc - Lindsell Train Japanese Equity Fund A Yen Acc
summary: Lindsell Train Global Funds plc - Lindsell Train Japanese Equity Fund A Yen Acc invests primarily in Japanese equities. The fund accumulates income and is denominated in Yen. Lindsell Train is a UK-based investment management company.

name: PineBridge Global Funds - Japan Small Cap Equity Fund A3
summary: The PineBridge Global Funds - Japan Small Cap Equity Fund A3 is a fund managed by PineBridge Investments, a global asset manager headquartered in New York. The fund focuses on investing in small capitalization companies in Japan, aiming to achieve long-term capital appreciation. The fund utilizes a bottom-up investment approach to identify companies with strong growth potential.

name: SPARX Japan Fund Institutional
summary: SPARX Japan Fund Institutional is an equity fund that invests in Japanese equities. The fund is managed by SPARX Asset Management. The "Institutional" designation indicates that it is designed for institutional investors.

name: Russell Investment Company II plc - Russell Investments World Equity Fund TYA
summary: Russell Investment Company II plc - Russell Investments World Equity Fund TYA is a sub-fund of Russell Investment Company II plc, domiciled in Ireland, and managed by Russell Investments. The fund seeks to provide capital appreciation by investing in a diversified portfolio of global equities. Russell Investments is a global investment management firm.

name: PineBridge Global Funds - India Equity Fund Y3
summary: PineBridge Global Funds - India Equity Fund Y3 is a sub-fund of PineBridge Global Funds, specializing in investments in the Indian equity market. The fund aims to achieve capital appreciation by investing primarily in stocks of companies domiciled in or exercising the predominant part of their economic activity in India. The Y3 represents a specific share class within the fund with a particular fee structure.

name: Lindsell Train Global Funds plc - Lindsell Train Japanese Equity Fund B Yen Inc
summary: The Lindsell Train Japanese Equity Fund focuses on investing in a concentrated portfolio of Japanese equities. The fund aims to generate long-term capital growth by investing in companies with strong brands, durable business models, and high returns on capital. Lindsell Train Limited, based in London, manages the fund with a long-term investment horizon.

name: Lindsell Train Global Funds plc - Lindsell Train Japanese Equity Fund B Yen Acc
summary: The Lindsell Train Japanese Equity Fund focuses on investing in a concentrated portfolio of Japanese equities. The fund aims to generate long-term capital growth by investing in companies with strong brands, durable business models, and high returns on capital. Lindsell Train Limited, based in London, manages the fund with a long-term investment horizon.

name: Yuki Japan Rebounding Growth Fund JPY Inc
summary: Yuki Japan Rebounding Growth Fund JPY Inc is an investment fund focused on Japanese equities, aiming to capitalize on companies expected to experience a growth rebound. The fund is denominated in Japanese Yen (JPY) and distributes income to investors. The fund provides investors exposure to potential growth opportunities in the Japanese stock market.

name: E.I. Sturdza Funds plc - Nippon Growth (UCITS) Fund M JPY
summary: E.I. Sturdza Funds plc - Nippon Growth (UCITS) Fund M JPY is a UCITS fund managed by E.I. Sturdza Funds plc, focusing on growth companies in Japan ("Nippon Growth"), and denominated in Japanese Yen ("JPY"). The "M" refers to a specific share class of the fund with unique features or fee structures. It invests in Japanese equities.

name: Man GLG Japan CoreAlpha Equity Class I JPY
summary: Man GLG Japan CoreAlpha Equity Class I JPY is a Japanese equity fund managed by Man GLG, a global investment management firm, that employs a core alpha strategy, focusing on selecting undervalued Japanese companies. The fund aims to generate long-term capital appreciation by investing in a concentrated portfolio of Japanese equities. The fund is denominated in JPY.

name: Lyxor Epsilon Managed Futures A JPY
summary: Lyxor Epsilon Managed Futures A JPY is a managed futures fund offered by Lyxor Asset Management, following a systematic investment strategy and denominated in Japanese Yen (JPY). The fund aims to generate returns by trading in futures contracts across various asset classes, such as commodities, currencies, and interest rates, based on quantitative models. The "A" designation indicates a specific share class with its own fee structure and investor eligibility requirements.

name: Muzinich ShortDurationHighYield Fund Hedged JPY Income S Units
summary: The Muzinich ShortDurationHighYield Fund Hedged JPY Income S Units is a fixed income fund that invests in short duration high yield bonds. Muzinich & Co., a global specialist in public and private corporate credit, manages the fund. The fund hedges its investments back to Japanese Yen (JPY) and distributes income to its unit holders (S Units).

name: Morant Wright Funds (Ireland) plc - Morant Wright Sakura Fund JPY Acc Unhedged
summary: Morant Wright Funds (Ireland) plc - Morant Wright Sakura Fund JPY Acc Unhedged invests in Japanese equities, without hedging the currency exposure to JPY and accumulating profits. Morant Wright is an investment management company. The fund aims to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing in Japanese equities.

name: GAM Star Japan Leaders Class Non UK RFS JPY Accumulation
summary: GAM Star Japan Leaders Class Non UK RFS JPY Accumulation is a Japan-focused equity fund that invests in leading companies in Japan, managed by GAM. The "Non UK RFS" refers to regulatory status or distribution restrictions outside the UK, and "JPY Accumulation" indicates the share class is denominated in Japanese Yen and reinvests all income. The fund aims to generate capital appreciation by investing in prominent Japanese businesses.

name: SPARX Japan Fund JPY Institutional B Class
summary: SPARX Japan Fund JPY Institutional B Class is an equity fund that invests in Japanese companies. The fund is managed by SPARX Asset Management and denominated in Japanese Yen. The fund targets institutional investors.
